[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100101 3
1 10011101 5
2 01011010 4
3 00100010 2
4 00111101 5
5 10010100 3
6 01101111 6
7 01010000 2

01 10 11000010 3
12 21 10111001 5
23 32 11111011 7
34 43 00111111 6
45 54 00011010 3
56 65 10000111 4
67 76 11011101 6
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 01111011 6
13 31 01000010 2
24 42 11000100 3
35 53 00100101 3 match 0
46 64 10011101 5 match 1
57 75 01011010 4 match 2
60 06 00100010 2 match 3
71 17 00111101 5 match 4

03 30 10000000 1
14 41 01111101 6
25 52 11011110 6
36 63 10100010 3
47 74 01000000 1
50 05 10100101 4
61 16 11100000 3
72 27 10000100 2

04 40 10111111 7
15 51 01100111 5
26 62 01011001 4
37 73 01111111 7
